title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Marico - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Marico - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Marico has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Marico:
Marico is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
